subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and thy sorrow and grief have deeply affected all hearts, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و حزن و اندوه شما سبب تاثر قلوب گردید زیرا مرا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
